SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.id

クラス MutableNanoIdGenerator

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.id.MutableNanoIdGenerator
すべての実装されたインタフェース:
IdGenerator<String>
public final class MutableNanoIdGenerator extends Object implements IdGenerator<String>
IdGenerator for mutable Nano ID-style strings: alphabet and length can be changed after construction while sharing one RandomGenerator.

Each generate() call reads the current configuration atomically as a snapshot, so a single id uses one consistent alphabet and length even if another thread updates configuration midway. Updating configuration uses compare-and-set loops so concurrent setAlphabet(java.lang.String), setSize(int), and configure(java.lang.String, int) calls compose without dropping unrelated fields (for example setAlphabet(java.lang.String) preserves the latest observed size).

The no-argument constructor and constructors that omit a RandomGenerator use the same cryptographically strong source as UuidV7. Thread safety of random draws follows the supplied RandomGenerator; if it is not thread-safe, callers must synchronize externally or confine use to one thread.

This class validates contracts on construction and on configuration mutators: non-null references with Objects.requireNonNull, positive size, and alphabet rules aligned with NanoIdGenerator. Violations produce NullPointerException or IllegalArgumentException as documented per method.

API note: Prefer configure(String, int) when changing both alphabet and length so callers never observe transient combinations of old alphabet with new length (or vice versa). Static nonCryptographic… factories create a fast SplittableRandom-backed generator and are unsuitable for security-sensitive identifiers for the same reasons as NanoIdGenerator.nonCryptographic().

導入されたバージョン:
0.2.0

  • コンストラクタの概要

    コンストラクタ
    コンストラクタ
    説明
    MutableNanoIdGenerator()
    Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET, NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE, and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    MutableNanoIdGenerator(@org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET and the given length with the supplied RandomGenerator.
    MutableNanoIdGenerator(@NonNull String alphabet, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
    Uses the given alphabet and length with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    MutableNanoIdGenerator(@NonNull String alphabet, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size, @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses the given alphabet, length, and RandomGenerator.
    MutableNanoIdGenerator(@NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
    Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET and NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE with the supplied RandomGenerator.

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    void
    configure(@NonNull String alphabet, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
    Atomically replaces alphabet and length.
    @NonNull String
    generate()
    Generates an id using the configuration observed at invocation start.
    static @NonNull MutableNanoIdGenerator
    nonCryptographic()
    Returns a mutable generator using defaults with a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
    static @NonNull MutableNanoIdGenerator
    nonCryptographic(@org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
    Returns a mutable generator using NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET, size, and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
    static @NonNull MutableNanoIdGenerator
    nonCryptographic(@NonNull String alphabet, @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
    Returns a mutable generator using alphabet, size, and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
    void
    setAlphabet(@NonNull String alphabet)
    Updates the alphabet while preserving the latest observed size.
    void
    setSize(@org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
    Updates size while preserving the latest observed alphabet and mask.

  • コンストラクタの詳細

    • MutableNanoIdGenerator

      public MutableNanoIdGenerator()
      Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET, NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE, and a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • MutableNanoIdGenerator

      public MutableNanoIdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET and NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_SIZE with the supplied RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      randomGenerator - entropy source; must not be null
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • MutableNanoIdGenerator

      public MutableNanoIdGenerator(@Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses NanoIdGenerator.DEFAULT_ALPHABET and the given length with the supplied RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      size - number of code points per id; must be positive
      randomGenerator - entropy source; must not be null
      例外:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is not positive
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • MutableNanoIdGenerator

      public MutableNanoIdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull String alphabet, @Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
      Uses the given alphabet and length with a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      alphabet - BMP code points only, unique, non-empty; must not be null
      size - number of characters per id; must be positive
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if alphabet is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if alphabet or size violates alphabet or size rules
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • MutableNanoIdGenerator

      public MutableNanoIdGenerator(@NonNull @NonNull String alphabet, @Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator randomGenerator)
      Uses the given alphabet, length, and RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      alphabet - BMP code points only, unique, non-empty; must not be null
      size - number of characters per id; must be positive
      randomGenerator - entropy source; must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any reference argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if alphabet or size violates alphabet or size rules
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • nonCryptographic

      @NonNull public static @NonNull MutableNanoIdGenerator nonCryptographic(@NonNull @NonNull String alphabet, @Positive @org.commonutils.annotation.Positive int size)
      Returns a mutable generator using alphabet, size, and a new SplittableRandom-backed RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      alphabet - BMP alphabet string; must not be null
      size - length per id; must be positive
      戻り値:
      a non-null generator
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if alphabet is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • setAlphabet

      public void setAlphabet(@NonNull @NonNull String alphabet)
      Updates the alphabet while preserving the latest observed size. Matches concurrent updates via compare-and-set.
      パラメータ:
      alphabet - BMP code points only, unique, non-empty; must not be null
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if alphabet is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if alphabet validation fails
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

      例外:
